positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical, negative space illustration of a bioluminescent forest meeting a cosmic nebula. The composition features stylized geometric flora (like mandalas and stylized leaves) emerging from a central void. The color palette is dominated by deep indigo, rich violet, turquoise, and glowing neon green accents. Style should be clean linework, graphic novel aesthetic, mixed with art deco geometry and detailed symmetry. Emphasis on strong contrast between the solid black background and the luminous, glowing subjects. Optimal for single-color screen printing on fabric, high contrast, centered, high resolution vector quality, print-ready digital artwork.
negative: blurry, lowres, signature, watermark, text, logo, copyright, messy, bad anatomy, deformed, noisy, smudge, grain, overly complex, photorealism, gradient blend
